entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange established in 2018 and currently operating spot-trading markets through the BitStorage Finance platform.
entity.notes: Independent exchange directories consistently place BitStorage's establishment in 2018, but they conflict on origin, including Seychelles and Ukraine. The reviewed official exchange and team surfaces do not identify a verifiable legal entity or domicile, so HEI retains the intentionally reviewed Unknown origin rather than forcing a disputed country.

events.title: BitStorage exchange established
events.description: BitStorage was established in 2018 as a centralized cryptocurrency exchange and later operated through the bitstorage.finance domain.
events.notes: The reviewed independent sources agree on the 2018 year but do not establish an exact launch day, so January 1 is used as a year-level date placeholder.

evidence.title: BitStorage official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current BitStorage identity and active exchange interface but does not provide a verifiable legal origin.

evidence.title: CoinPaprika exchange reference for BitStorage
evidence.notes: Independent exchange directory reference used to corroborate the BitStorage identity.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for BitStorage
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the active BitStorage exchange identity.

evidence.title: CoinGecko BitStorage exchange profile
evidence.notes: CoinGecko identifies BitStorage as a centralized exchange established in 2018. Its Seychelles registration claim is not used as canonical origin without official corroboration.

evidence.title: CoinCodex BitStorage exchange profile
evidence.notes: Independent profile also identifies a 2018 launch. Its headquarters claim is treated as secondary and does not override the reviewed Unknown origin.
